name: Priyadarshani
heroImageAlt: Priyadarshani stands sideways in a lush garden setting, wearing a white sleeveless top and blue jeans while looking at the camera with a gentle smile.
aboutHeading: A life devoted to craft, culture and quiet impact.
biography:
Priyadarshani was born in April 2009 into the Shrivastava family. From an early age, she has shown enthusiasm for learning and exploring new opportunities to express her creativity and skills.
She is currently pursuing a Diploma in Civil Engineering, demonstrating her interest in technical knowledge and the field of infrastructure and construction. Alongside her academic journey, she is also a content creator, using digital platforms to share ideas and engage with a wider audience through creative and meaningful content.
description: Recognised by audiences and critics alike, Priyadarshani continues to choose work that asks difficult questions — and answers them with grace.
quote: Elegance is not about being noticed. It is about being remembered.
galleryDescription: A curated selection of editorial portraits, stills and stage photography from across the years.
